name: All-in-One Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Medium Egg Noodles (cooked and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the egg noodles according to package instructions and drain.
2. Thaw the frozen peas and carrots in the refrigerator overnight or microwave them for a few minutes until thawed.
3. Drain the tuna well and flake it into small pieces.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cooked egg noodles, drained peas and carrots, flaked tuna, and shredded cheddar cheese (1/2 cup).
5. Stir in the milk to taste, adjusting the consistency of the casserole as needed.
6. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes or until heated through and golden brown on top.
7. Turn off the heat and let the casserole cool slightly before serving.
